available.name: dashscope_asr
best_for: word-level timestamp transcription for subtitle alignment
Mandarin and English speech recognition
replacing whisperx when word-level granularity is needed
available.install_instructions:
Set DASHSCOPE_API_KEY to your Alibaba Cloud DashScope API key.
  Get one at https://dashscope.aliyun.com/

available.name: audio_energy
best_for: finding where ambient music gets interesting (skip quiet intros)
choosing the best offset for a music track in a video
determining if a music track needs looping for a longer video
available.install_instructions:
Install ffmpeg:
  Windows: winget install ffmpeg
  macOS: brew install ffmpeg
  Linux: sudo apt install ffmpeg

available.name: frame_sampler
available.install_instructions: Install FFmpeg: https://ffmpeg.org/download.html

available.name: scene_detect
available.install_instructions:
FFmpeg is required. For better detection install PySceneDetect:
pip install scenedetect[opencv]

available.name: visual_qa
available.install_instructions: Install FFmpeg: https://ffmpeg.org/download.html

available.name: audio_probe
best_for: getting audio/video duration before composition
validating media file format and codec
pre-render checks on asset files
available.install_instructions:
Install ffmpeg (includes ffprobe):
  Windows: winget install ffmpeg
  macOS: brew install ffmpeg
  Linux: sudo apt install ffmpeg

available.name: composition_validator
best_for: catching audio-video duration mismatches before render
verifying all referenced assets exist
pre-flight check before expensive render operations
available.install_instructions: Requires ffprobe on PATH (part of ffmpeg).

available.name: video_analyzer
best_for: comprehensive video analysis
reference video understanding
style extraction from example video
understanding video structure and pacing
available.install_instructions:
Core: FFmpeg is required (https://ffmpeg.org/download.html)
For URL downloads: pip install yt-dlp
For YouTube transcripts: pip install youtube-transcript-api
For local transcription: pip install faster-whisper
For scene detection: pip install scenedetect[opencv]
All dependencies are free and local — no API keys needed.

unavailable.name: azure_stt
best_for: Cloud transcription with word-level timestamps and no GPU
Multi-language auto-detection across a candidate locale set
Speaker diarization without a HuggingFace token
unavailable.install_instructions:
Set your Azure AI Speech credentials:
  export AZURE_SPEECH_KEY=your_speech_resource_key
  export AZURE_SPEECH_REGION=eastus   # your Speech resource region
Create a Speech resource in the Azure portal (https://portal.azure.com) — the key and region are on its 'Keys and Endpoint' page. Optionally set AZURE_SPEECH_ENDPOINT to a full custom endpoint URL instead of the region.

unavailable.name: face_tracker
unavailable.install_instructions:
For best results install MediaPipe:
pip install mediapipe opencv-python

Falls back to OpenCV Haar cascade (ships with opencv-python).

unavailable.name: video_understand
unavailable.install_instructions: pip install transformers torch  # For CLIP/BLIP-2 visual understanding

unavailable.name: transcriber
unavailable.install_instructions:
pip install faster-whisper  # CPU mode
pip install faster-whisper[gpu]  # GPU mode (requires CUDA)
pip install whisperx  # For diarization support

unavailable.name: transcript_fetcher
best_for: fast YouTube transcript extraction
caption-based analysis without video download
getting timestamped text from YouTube videos
unavailable.install_instructions: Install youtube-transcript-api: pip install youtube-transcript-api

available.name: audio_enhance
available.install_instructions: Install FFmpeg: https://ffmpeg.org/download.html

available.name: audio_mixer
available.install_instructions:
FFmpeg is required. pydub is optional for advanced mixing:
pip install pydub

unavailable.name: kling_avatar
best_for: official Kling cloud avatar presenter clips
high-quality image-to-video avatar generation from a supplied portrait
projects already using a Kling official account and resource pack
unavailable.install_instructions: Set KLING_API_KEY in .env for the official Kling API. Provide an avatar image plus either audio_id or sound_file/audio_path.

unavailable.name: kling_lip_sync
best_for: official Kling cloud lip-sync for existing presenter video
dubbing workflows that can use Kling face identification
manual or explicit automatic face selection before paid lip-sync generation
unavailable.install_instructions: Set KLING_API_KEY in .env for the official Kling API. Use identify_face first for multi-person clips, then pass face_choose or face_id.

unavailable.name: talking_head
unavailable.install_instructions:
Clone https://github.com/OpenTalker/SadTalker and set SADTALKER_PATH env var
Requires: PyTorch with CUDA, ffmpeg
pip install sadtalker  # or clone the repo

unavailable.name: lip_sync
unavailable.install_instructions:
Option 1: pip install wav2lip (if available)
Option 2: Clone https://github.com/Rudrabha/Wav2Lip and set WAV2LIP_PATH env var
Requires: PyTorch with CUDA, ffmpeg

available.name: character_spec_generator
best_for: Converting approved concepts into structured character_design artifacts

available.name: direct_clip_search
best_for: act-by-act documentary production with manual clip selection
fast B-roll acquisition when you know what you need
downloading clips from multiple providers in one call
building clip libraries without CLIP embedding overhead
available.install_instructions:
At least one stock source must be configured:
  PEXELS_API_KEY for Pexels (free at https://www.pexels.com/api/)
  UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY for Unsplash (see https://unsplash.com/documentation)
  archive.org, nasa, and wikimedia work without API keys

source_provider_menu.name: pexels
source_provider_menu.install_instructions: Set PEXELS_API_KEY in .env to enable Pexels stock search (free key at https://www.pexels.com/api/).

source_provider_menu.name: pixabay_video
source_provider_menu.install_instructions: Set PIXABAY_API_KEY in .env to enable Pixabay Video search (free key at https://pixabay.com/api/docs/).

source_provider_menu.name: coverr
source_provider_menu.install_instructions: Coverr works without an API key (free tier, 50 req/hr). Set COVERR_API_KEY in .env for higher rate limits (Pro tier).

source_provider_menu.name: unsplash
source_provider_menu.install_instructions: Set UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY in .env to enable Unsplash image search (see https://unsplash.com/documentation).

source_provider_menu.name: mixkit
source_provider_menu.install_instructions: Mixkit works without an API key. Scrapes the Mixkit website. Requires beautifulsoup4: pip install beautifulsoup4

source_provider_menu.name: archive_org
source_provider_menu.install_instructions: No setup required. Archive.org is available without API keys.

source_provider_menu.name: videvo
source_provider_menu.install_instructions: Set VIDEVO_API_KEY in .env to enable Videvo stock search (get API access at https://www.videvo.net/api/).

source_provider_menu.name: wikimedia
source_provider_menu.install_instructions: No setup required. Wikimedia Commons media search works without API keys.

source_provider_menu.name: nasa
source_provider_menu.install_instructions: No setup required. NASA media search works without an API key; NASA_API_KEY is optional for higher rate limits.

source_provider_menu.name: nara
source_provider_menu.install_instructions: NARA works without an API key. Set NARA_API_KEY in .env for higher rate limits.

source_provider_menu.name: pond5_pd
source_provider_menu.install_instructions: Pond5 Public Domain works without an API key for basic search. Set POND5_API_KEY in .env for higher rate limits and full API access.

source_provider_menu.name: loc
source_provider_menu.install_instructions: Library of Congress works without an API key. No setup needed.

source_provider_menu.name: esa
source_provider_menu.install_instructions: ESA works without an API key. Scrapes the ESA Multimedia gallery. Requires beautifulsoup4: pip install beautifulsoup4

source_provider_menu.name: noaa
source_provider_menu.install_instructions: NOAA works without an API key. Scrapes the NOAA multimedia pages. Requires beautifulsoup4: pip install beautifulsoup4

source_provider_menu.name: dareful
source_provider_menu.install_instructions: Dareful works without an API key. Scrapes the Dareful website. Requires beautifulsoup4: pip install beautifulsoup4

source_provider_menu.name: jaxa
source_provider_menu.install_instructions: JAXA works without an API key. Scrapes the JAXA Digital Archives. Requires beautifulsoup4: pip install beautifulsoup4

unavailable.name: clip_search

finding collection-style sets from one seed clip
de-duplicating a candidate list before edit arrangement

pip install numpy transformers torch
Requires a corpus built by corpus_builder at <corpus_dir>.

  archive.org, nasa, and wikimedia work without API keys

available.name: color_grade
available.install_instructions: Install FFmpeg: https://ffmpeg.org/download.html

available.name: face_enhance
available.install_instructions: Install FFmpeg: https://ffmpeg.org/download.html

unavailable.name: face_restore
unavailable.install_instructions:
uv pip install gfpgan torch
Works on: CUDA (NVIDIA), MPS (Apple Silicon M-series, macOS >= 12.3), CPU fallback.
No CUDA build needed on macOS — uv pip install torch includes MPS support.

unavailable.name: eye_enhance
unavailable.install_instructions:
For best results install MediaPipe and OpenCV:
pip install mediapipe opencv-python numpy

Without MediaPipe, falls back to FFmpeg eye-region filter (less precise).

unavailable.name: upscale
unavailable.install_instructions:
uv pip install realesrgan torch
Works on: CUDA (NVIDIA), MPS (Apple Silicon M-series, macOS >= 12.3), CPU fallback.
No separate CUDA build needed on macOS — uv pip install torch includes MPS support.

unavailable.name: bg_remove
unavailable.install_instructions:
pip install rembg       # CPU mode
pip install rembg[gpu]  # GPU mode (requires CUDA + onnxruntime-gpu)

available.name: diagram_gen
available.install_instructions:
For Mermaid diagrams:
  npm install -g @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli
For Pillow-based diagrams (fallback):
  pip install Pillow

available.name: code_snippet
available.install_instructions: pip install Pygments Pillow

unavailable.name: math_animate
unavailable.install_instructions:
Install ManimCE:
  pip install manim
  manim checkhealth
Requires: Python 3.8+, FFmpeg, LaTeX (optional, for math formulas)
  Windows: choco install miktex ffmpeg
  macOS: brew install mactex ffmpeg
  Linux: sudo apt install texlive-full ffmpeg

available.name: dashscope_image
best_for: high-quality image generation with Qwen-Image models
Chinese-language prompt understanding
cost-effective image generation via Alibaba Cloud
available.install_instructions:
Set DASHSCOPE_API_KEY to your Alibaba Cloud DashScope API key.
  Get one at https://dashscope.aliyun.com/

available.name: google_imagen
best_for: high-quality photorealistic images
Google ecosystem integration
fast generation with multiple aspect ratios
available.install_instructions:
Auth option A — API key (AI Studio): set GOOGLE_API_KEY (or GEMINI_API_KEY).
  Get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey
Auth option B — service account (Vertex AI): set GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
  to a service-account JSON key (needs the 'google-auth' package), plus
  GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT and optionally GOOGLE_CLOUD_LOCATION (default us-central1).
  Requires the Vertex AI API enabled and billing on the project.

available.name: image_gen
best_for: DEPRECATED — prefer image_selector which routes to per-provider tools (flux_image, openai_image, recraft_image, grok_image, local_diffusion, pexels_image, pixabay_image).
Kept only for backwards compatibility. New code should not call this.
available.install_instructions:
Set one of these environment variables:
  OPENAI_API_KEY — for GPT Image 2
  FAL_KEY — for FLUX via fal.ai
Or install diffusers for local generation:
  pip install diffusers transformers accelerate torch

available.name: openai_image
best_for: complex multi-element compositions
images with text/labels
following detailed instructions accurately
available.install_instructions:
Set OPENAI_API_KEY to your OpenAI API key.
  pip install openai

unavailable.name: comfyui_image
best_for: local GPU generation without API costs
Blackwell / DGX Spark hardware where diffusers is unsupported
full control over sampling via custom ComfyUI workflows
unavailable.install_instructions:
Start a ComfyUI server and set COMFYUI_SERVER_URL (default http://localhost:8188).
See https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI for setup.

setup_offer.fix_complexity: 1-minute env-var if ComfyUI is already running; otherwise local install
what_it_unlocks: free local image generation through ComfyUI workflows
free local video generation through ComfyUI workflows

unavailable.name: flux_image
best_for: photorealistic images
general-purpose image generation
high quality at low cost (~$0.03/image)
unavailable.install_instructions:
Set FAL_KEY to your fal.ai API key.
  Get one at https://fal.ai/dashboard/keys

unavailable.name: grok_image
best_for: single-image edits and style transfers
multi-image compositing into one generated frame
general-purpose image generation with aspect ratio control
unavailable.install_instructions:
Set XAI_API_KEY to your xAI API key.
  Get one from the xAI developer console

unavailable.name: kling_official_image
best_for: official Kling image generation
subject or face reference generation
Omni multi-reference image workflows
unavailable.install_instructions: Set KLING_API_KEY in .env for the official Kling API. Optionally set KLING_API_BASE_URL to override the default Singapore endpoint.

unavailable.name: local_diffusion
best_for: offline/air-gapped generation
free image generation (no API cost)
privacy-sensitive workflows
unavailable.install_instructions:
Install diffusers for local Stable Diffusion:
  pip install diffusers transformers accelerate torch

unavailable.name: pexels_image
best_for: real-world photography (cities, nature, people, objects)
establishing shots and B-roll stills
free stock images — no cost, no attribution required
unavailable.install_instructions:
Set PEXELS_API_KEY to your Pexels API key.
  Get one free at https://www.pexels.com/api/

unavailable.name: pixabay_image
best_for: large royalty-free library (5M+ images)
category-based filtering (nature, business, science, etc.)
free stock images — no cost, no attribution required
unavailable.install_instructions:
Set PIXABAY_API_KEY to your Pixabay API key.
  Get one free at https://pixabay.com/api/docs/

unavailable.name: recraft_image
best_for: logos and brand assets
SVG vector output
images with accurate text rendering
clean professional graphics
unavailable.install_instructions:
Set FAL_KEY to your fal.ai API key.
  Get one at https://fal.ai/dashboard/keys

available.name: google_music
best_for: high-quality instrumental background music
genre-specific music guided by rich text prompts
Google ecosystem integration
available.install_instructions:
Configure Google credentials:
  - Set GEMINI_API_KEY (or GOOGLE_API_KEY) in environment.
  - Or set GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS for Vertex AI service account.

unavailable.name: music_gen
unavailable.install_instructions:
Set the ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable:
  export ELEVENLABS_API_KEY=your_key_here
Get a key at https://elevenlabs.io

unavailable.name: suno_music
best_for: full song generation with vocals and lyrics
high-quality instrumental background music
genre-specific music (any genre)
longer tracks up to 8 minutes
unavailable.install_instructions:
Set the SUNO_API_KEY environment variable:
  export SUNO_API_KEY=your_key_here
Get a key at https://sunoapi.org/api-key

unavailable.name: music_library
best_for: user-provided, intentional background music
free music with no API key or generation cost
knowing music options at the proposal stage
unavailable.install_instructions: Create a 'music_library/' folder in the project root and drop royalty-free audio tracks into it (e.g. .mp3, .wav, .m4a, .flac, .ogg). Sources: your own files, YouTube Audio Library, Jamendo, Freesound, etc. Override the location with the MUSIC_LIBRARY_DIR environment variable.

available.name: pixabay_music
best_for: quick background music with zero setup (no API key)
royalty-free music for any commercial project
high-quality produced tracks (not raw samples)
available.install_instructions:
No setup required. Pixabay Music is free and needs no API key.
Note: This tool scrapes the Pixabay website. If it breaks, the
site's HTML structure may have changed. Use freesound_music as fallback.

unavailable.name: freesound_music
best_for: ambient and atmospheric background music
free Creative Commons licensed audio
searching by mood, genre, or instrument tags
finding loops, drones, and textural audio
unavailable.install_instructions:
Set the FREESOUND_API_KEY environment variable:
  export FREESOUND_API_KEY=your_key_here
Get a free key at https://freesound.org/apiv2/apply/

available.name: export_bundle
best_for: packaging a finished render for hand-off to any platform
producing a schema-valid publish_log without an external account
offline / no-API-key publishing
available.install_instructions: No setup required — runs locally with the Python standard library.

available.name: cap_recorder
best_for: Professional screen recordings with webcam overlay
Cursor highlight and click effect recordings
Recording with a visual UI (not CLI-driven)
Recordings that need polished audio capture
available.install_instructions:
Cap is a free, open-source Loom alternative.

Install from: https://cap.so/download
  - Windows: Download and run the installer
  - macOS: Download the .dmg or use: brew install --cask cap
  - Linux: Download the AppImage from GitHub releases

Source code: https://github.com/CapSoftware/cap

Cap provides webcam overlay, cursor highlighting, and a polished
recording UI that FFmpeg-based recording cannot match.

available.name: screen_recorder
best_for: Quick screen recording without additional software
Automated screen capture for demo pipelines
Recording specific screen regions for tutorials
available.install_instructions:
Install ffmpeg:
  Windows: winget install ffmpeg
  macOS: brew install ffmpeg
  Linux: sudo apt install ffmpeg

available.name: video_downloader
best_for: downloading reference video from URL
extracting audio from online video
downloading subtitles from YouTube
getting video metadata without downloading
available.install_instructions:
Install yt-dlp: pip install yt-dlp
For YouTube support, also install Deno (JS runtime): https://deno.land/#installation
Without Deno, YouTube downloads may fail but other platforms still work.

available.name: subtitle_gen
available.install_instructions: No external dependencies required.

available.name: remotion_caption_burn
available.install_instructions:
Remotion (optional, preferred): npm install in remotion-composer/
FFmpeg (required for fallback): https://ffmpeg.org/download.html

Auth option A — API key: set GOOGLE_API_KEY (or GEMINI_API_KEY) to a

Get a key at https://platform.openai.com/

unavailable.name: doubao_tts

Chinese explainer voiceovers with character-level timestamps

unavailable.install_instructions:
Set DOUBAO_SPEECH_API_KEY to a Volcengine Doubao Speech API Key.
Optional: set DOUBAO_SPEECH_VOICE_TYPE to the default speaker voice.
Use the new console API key flow; do not pass app id/access token as the API key.

unavailable.name: elevenlabs_tts
best_for: high-quality narration
voice-sensitive spokesperson videos
multilingual spoken delivery
unavailable.install_instructions:
Set the ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable:

Get a key at https://elevenlabs.io

unavailable.name: kling_tts
best_for: official Kling text-to-speech
Chinese or English narration when a Kling voice_id is known
keeping narration provider provenance inside the Kling official account
unavailable.install_instructions: Set KLING_API_KEY in .env for the official Kling API. Pass voice_id explicitly; OpenMontage does not guess Kling voice IDs.

unavailable.name: piper_tts
best_for: offline narration fallback
privacy-sensitive local-only workflows
unavailable.install_instructions:
Install Piper TTS:
  pip install piper-tts
Or download from https://github.com/rhasspy/piper/releases
Then download a voice model:
  piper --download-dir ~/.piper/models --model en_US-lessac-medium

available.name: gemini_omni_video
best_for: iterative natural-language video editing (edit a clip without regenerating it)
reference-image-driven clips via <FIRST_FRAME>/<IMAGE_REF_N> prompt tags
fast 3-10s clips with synced audio, rendered text, and timecoded beats from one Google key
available.install_instructions:
Set GEMINI_API_KEY or GOOGLE_API_KEY to a Google AI Studio API key.
  Get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey
  Gemini Omni Flash is paid-tier only (no free tier); ~$0.10 per second of video.

available.name: veo_video
best_for: videos with synchronized dialogue and audio
cutting-edge quality from Google DeepMind
ambient sound and music generation built in
available.install_instructions:
Configure at least one backend API key:
  - Direct Google GenAI backend: Set GEMINI_API_KEY (or GOOGLE_API_KEY).
    Get a key at https://aistudio.google.com/
    Or set GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS for Vertex AI service account.
  - FAL.ai backend: Set FAL_KEY (or FAL_AI_API_KEY).
    Get one at https://fal.ai/dashboard/keys

unavailable.name: cogvideo_video
best_for: lower-VRAM local video experimentation
teams that want an explicit CogVideo family path in the registry
unavailable.install_instructions:
Enable local video generation and install the diffusers stack:
  export VIDEO_GEN_LOCAL_ENABLED=true
  uv pip install diffusers transformers accelerate torch pillow requests

GPU support — pick what matches your hardware:
  NVIDIA CUDA    — works out of the box with the above
  Apple Silicon (MPS, macOS >= 12.3) — works out of the box; no extra build
  CPU fallback   — slow but functional on any machine

VRAM profile: see the selected tool's resource_profile for minimum VRAM.

unavailable.name: comfyui_video
best_for: local GPU video generation without API costs
Blackwell / DGX Spark hardware where diffusers is unsupported
image-to-video with WAN 2.2 14B (4-step accelerated)
text-to-video with WAN 2.2 14B (4-step accelerated)
custom low-VRAM ComfyUI workflows on 8GB-12GB GPUs
unavailable.install_instructions:
Start a ComfyUI server and set COMFYUI_SERVER_URL (default http://localhost:8188).
Requires WAN 2.2 models and LightX2V LoRAs in ComfyUI's model directory.

setup_offer.fix_complexity: 1-minute env-var if ComfyUI is already running; otherwise local install
what_it_unlocks: free local image generation through ComfyUI workflows
free local video generation through ComfyUI workflows

provider_floor.applies_to: ComfyUI provider availability and low-VRAM custom workflows. Actual requirements depend on workflow_json/workflow_path.

bundled_wan22_14b_fp8.applies_to: Bundled WAN 2.2 14B FP8 T2V/I2V workflows. This is not a ComfyUI provider-wide requirement.

examples: LTX-Video / LTXV FP8 or quantized workflows

unavailable.resource_profile_note: The top-level resource_profile is a ComfyUI provider floor, not a promise that every workflow fits 8GB VRAM. Bundled WAN 2.2 14B FP8 workflows recommend 16GB VRAM; custom low-VRAM workflows can target 8GB-12GB depending on model, quantization, resolution, and frame count.

unavailable.name: higgsfield_video
best_for: preferred premium video gen on Higgsfield (Seedance 2.0 is the default model)
cinematic trailers, teasers, and high-fidelity clips with native synchronized audio
character-consistent video generation (Soul ID + Seedance 2.0 identity consistency)
director-level camera control and multi-shot editing in a single generation

unavailable.install_instructions:
Set HIGGSFIELD_API_KEY and HIGGSFIELD_API_SECRET for your Higgsfield Cloud credentials.
  Get them at https://cloud.higgsfield.ai/api-keys
  Alternatively, set HIGGSFIELD_KEY as a combined key:secret value.

unavailable.name: hunyuan_video
best_for: local generation when Hunyuan motion behavior fits the brief
teams that want one known Hunyuan baseline instead of multiple variants
unavailable.install_instructions:
Enable local video generation and install the diffusers stack:
  export VIDEO_GEN_LOCAL_ENABLED=true
  uv pip install diffusers transformers accelerate torch pillow requests

GPU support — pick what matches your hardware:
  NVIDIA CUDA    — works out of the box with the above
  Apple Silicon (MPS, macOS >= 12.3) — works out of the box; no extra build
  CPU fallback   — slow but functional on any machine

VRAM profile: see the selected tool's resource_profile for minimum VRAM.

FFmpeg is required. For face-tracked reframing, also install:
pip install mediapipe opencv-python

Without MediaPipe/OpenCV, falls back to center-crop.

unavailable.name: hyperframes_compose
best_for: HTML/CSS/GSAP composition: kinetic typography, product promos, launch reels
Motion-graphics-heavy briefs where the scene library in remotion-composer/ doesn't fit
Website-to-video / UI-driven compositions
Registry-block-driven scenes (hyperframes add data-chart, grain-overlay, etc.)
unavailable.install_instructions: Requires Node.js >= 22 (https://nodejs.org/) and FFmpeg (https://ffmpeg.org/download.html). The HyperFrames CLI is fetched on first use via `npx hyperframes` (npm package: `hyperframes`). Note: the upstream monorepo develops the package as `@hyperframes/cli`, but it publishes to npm as `hyperframes`. `npx @hyperframes/cli` returns 404 -- do NOT use that form. Verify setup with `npx hyperframes doctor` or run the `doctor` operation on this tool.

setup_offer.install_instructions: Requires Node.js >= 22 (https://nodejs.org/) and FFmpeg (https://ffmpeg.org/download.html). The HyperFrames CLI is fetched on first use via `npx hyperframes` (npm package: `hyperframes`). Note: the upstream monorepo develops the package as `@hyperframes/cli`, but it publishes to npm as `hyperframes`. `npx @hyperframes/cli` returns 404 -- do NOT use that form. Verify setup with `npx hyperframes doctor` or run the `doctor` operation on this tool.
setup_offer.unlocks: HTML/CSS/GSAP composition runtime — kinetic typography, product promos, registry blocks, website-to-video.
